issues.detail: Installation commands use npm/pip without checksum verification.

scenarios.name: Add observability to Lambda
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for raw console.log, AWSXRay, and CloudWatch putMetricData rather than Powertools; treatment wired Logger/Tracer/Metrics via middy with injectLambdaContext, captureLambdaHandler, logMetrics, MetricUnit, and appendKeys correlation IDs.

scenarios.name: Idempotent payment handler
scenarios.rationale: Baseline hand-rolled a DynamoDB conditional-write lock; treatment used makeIdempotent with DynamoDBPersistenceLayer and IdempotencyConfig including eventKeyJmesPath and expiresAfterSeconds TTL.
